Application.Name: TeamViewer ID Import v1.00
Application.Description:
Synchronizes the TeamViewer ID on Alvao computer objects by matching on hostname against the TeamViewer tenant (both the managed and legacy device lists). When a hostname matches multiple TeamViewer devices, the most recently active one (newest last_seen) wins.
The TeamViewer API token must have the following scopes: "Computers & Contacts - view entries" and "Managed groups - read operations".
Settings: - ApiToken: TeamViewer Web API bearer token. - ApiBase: Base URL of the TeamViewer Web API (default https://webapi.teamviewer.com/api/v1). - DryRun: When true, the sync only logs the changes it would make without writing anything; switch to false for real updates. - EnableLogging: When true, informational messages are written to the Diagnostic Log; errors are always logged regardless. - RunAtHour: Hour of day (0-23) at which the sync should run; set to -1 to run every time the periodic action fires. - PropertyKey: Name of the Alvao custom property to update (default "TeamViewer ID"). - ClassIdDesktop / ClassIdNotebook: lintClassId values identifying desktop and notebook objects in tblNode.
Recommended rollout: run with DryRun=true first, review the Diagnostic Log, then set DryRun=false.

Script.Name: Settings
TeamViewerImportPeriodicAction
